brief_justification: Arrives at correct answer (D) through valid UTC conversion chain; explores three levels including DST reconsideration and per-option analysis; explicitly catches and names a mid-reasoning error ('Wait — let me check the options'); re-derives with both UTC−8 and UTC−7 and cross-checks all four options; openly flags the 4 AM vs 4 PM discrepancy in option D while still selecting it as best available; systematically explains why each of the four options is wrong or partially right; every arithmetic step is shown making the chain fully reproducible; avoids conflating reference frames but does not explicitly name the negative gate pattern about satellite signal delay; suppressed modes (global simultaneity assumption, physics-limit blindness) are absent but not explicitly called out; frames the problem as 'distinct observer reference frames' echoing the topology's extract-local-frame structure but does not trace the full gate/branch path of the injected DAG.
